title: Responsible by Practice.
intro: We are a printing company first, but the way we run our floors already reflects a lot of what sustainability asks for.

bullets.waste: Near zero waste press floors, offcuts recovered and reused across every facility
bullets.fsc: FSC certified paper sourcing built into how we buy, not an add on
bullets.iso: ISO 14001:2015 certified environmental management system across our facilities
bullets.disposal: Responsible disposal of ink, chemicals and press waste, audited and documented

sceneAlt: Illustrated scene of butterflies drifting over stroke-drawn branches, marked with an FSC certification plate
